case_title: CALLAS, KENDALL VS SHIPPEY, RAYDON IND/DBA LEGAL BEAGLE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,381.40 FILED BY CALLAS, KENDALL AS TO DEFENDANT SHIPPEY, RAYDON IND/DBA LEGAL BEAGLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO RAYDON SHIPPEY OWNER & IND.LEGAL BEAGLE RETURNED REFUSED;
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-24-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-06-1998 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DOCUMENT(PLTF'S CLAIM) RETURNED FROM PILGRIM ATTORNEY SERVICES LEFT AT THERE ADDRESS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALLAS, KENDALL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHIPPEY, RAYDON IND/DBA LEGAL BEAGLE $2,381.40 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,436.40 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHIPPEY, RAYDON IND/DBA LEGAL BEAGLE
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SHIPPEY, RAYDON IND/DBA LEGAL BEAGLE HEARING SET FOR APR-17-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-17-1998, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALLAS, KENDALL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHIPPEY, RAYDON IND/DBA LEGAL BEAGLE $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $555.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SHIPPEY, RAYDON IND/DBA LEGAL BEAGLE
